title: VxRail Virtual Machine Storage Policy Mismatch Detection
app: Storage policy audit export from vSAN/vSphere
spl:
index=vxrail sourcetype="vxrail:vsan_capacity" earliest=-12h
| eval mm=lower(coalesce(mismatch, is_mismatch))
| where mm="true" OR effective_policy!=desired_policy
| stats values(effective_policy) as eff, values(desired_policy) as want by vm_name, cluster_id
description: Policy drift means VMs may run with lower FTT than the business expects, especially after storage vMotion or restores.
value: Aligns guest protection with governance tags and RPO/RTO commitments.
implementation: Schedule policy reconciliation. Alert on mismatch. Automate remediation via Storage Policy refresh workflows.
visualization: Table mismatched VMs; count by cluster; trend fixes.
grandmaExplanation: We watch your integrated rack-scale cluster—disks, updates, support uploads, and copy jobs—so small hardware or software issues do not grow into long outages.
